text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So that's the Mega Tree! How do you think it'll be decorated? 
Oh, I can't wait to see☆ Tarumae, Acute, look!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, Rickey! We're here to check out the prep for 
the Christmas concert, not to have fun.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I know, trust me! How can I not when it's a collaboration 
with the Oi Racecourse?♪ Let me just work my feng shui 
to bring in the good luck☆

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
It looks like a right cozy little job♪ Covering the track 
in sparkling decorative lights. Umm… that's what the 
"illumination" part meant, didn't it?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep! That's why it's called "Tokyo Mega Illumi"! 
It's a major event at the Oi racecourse☆

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: The colorful lights all over the track are breathtaking! It's even better than Tomakomai Station and the place everyone wants to be for snazzy pics right now♪

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
My oh my, and we get to do a… "collab" with an event that big 
for a Christmas concert? That really is a great honor.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
…That said, the place still looks rather dreary 
for an event that is about to start, don't it…?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
…! This flow of Ki is… disturbed!? 
Don't tell me there's trouble!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Heeey come on, you're supposed to attract good luck…

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: She's right though! Luck or not, we've got biiig trouble!!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: We overheard some of the venue staff earlier…

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There was some kind of logistics slipup with the lights 
and other ornaments, so everything's running late!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: They might not even make it in time for the concert…

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's exactly the time for Rickey ☆ Lucky ☆ Horsegirl Power!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's go help them out! Nothing can stop the combined 
power of horsegirls and feng shui☆

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
…Feng shui aside, I agree with helping out! 
Missing out on an event like this is unacceptable!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I'm all for it♪ It's a chance to give back 
to the racecourses and all they do for us.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
…Well, we came to ask you guys to join because we wanted 
to help out, but it sounds like we're on the same page already!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hahah, yeah, y'all took the words right outta our mouths!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm glad we can count on you…!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Alriiight, we'll make sure that illumination 
finds its way into the Mega Tree together!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Yeaaah!!
